Type Property# TKErrorTokenNotFound

iOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatediPadOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedMac Catalyst 13.1–13.1DeprecatedmacOS 10.10–10.11DeprecatedtvOS 9.0–9.0DeprecatedvisionOS 1.0–1.0DeprecatedwatchOS 2.0–2.0Deprecated

```
static var TKErrorTokenNotFound: TKError.Code { get }
```

Deprecated

Use [`TKError.Code.tokenNotFound`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/tokennotfound) instead.

## [See Also](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKError/Code/TKErrorTokenNotFound#see-also)

### [Error Codes](/documentation/CryptoTokenKit/TKError/Code/TKErrorTokenNotFound#Error-Codes)

[`case notImplemented`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/notimplemented)The functionality is not implemented.[`case communicationError`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/communicationerror)A communication error occurred.[`case corruptedData`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/corrupteddata)The data was corrupted.[`case canceledByUser`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/canceledbyuser)The operation was canceled by the user.[`case authenticationFailed`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/authenticationfailed)Authentication failed.[`case objectNotFound`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/objectnotfound)The object was not found.[`case tokenNotFound`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/tokennotfound)The token was not found.[`case badParameter`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/badparameter)An invalid parameter was provided.[`case authenticationNeeded`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/authenticationneeded)Authentication is needed.[`static var TKErrorAuthenticationFailed: TKError.Code`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/tkerrorauthenticationfailed)Deprecated[`static var TKErrorObjectNotFound: TKError.Code`](/documentation/cryptotokenkit/tkerror/code/tkerrorobjectnotfound)Deprecated
